findings.title: Pipe to interpreter: curl | python3
findings.description:
Command pipes output from 'curl' directly to interpreter 'python3'. Downloaded content will be executed without inspection.
  Safer: tirith run https://api.github.com/user/repos?per_page=3&sort=updated  — or: vet https://api.github.com/user/repos?per_page=3&sort=updated  (https://getvet.sh)
